channel.title: AFC Ajax — PlayersB fixtures
channel.description: Recent and upcoming fixtures for AFC Ajax on PlayersB.

item.title: 2026-01-28 (H) AFC Ajax 1-2 PAE Olympiakos SFP
item.description: AFC Ajax played PAE Olympiakos SFP (H) on 2026-01-28. Competition: Champions League. Status: FINISHED.
